title: Lead Instructional Designer at NASSCOM Foundation

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NASSCOM Foundation
jsonLd.description:
NASSCOM Foundation invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About NASSCOM Foundation:
NASSCOM Foundation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation!
